user.title: SNMP Switch – Connection
user.description: Choose the SNMP version. The next step will show the matching credentials.

community.title: SNMP Community Strings
community.description: Read community string is required. Write community is optional (for port toggle and services).

v3.title: SNMPv3 USM Credentials
v3.description:
Security levels:
• **noAuthNoPriv** – username only
• **authNoPriv** – auth protocol + passphrase
• **authPriv** – auth + privacy (recommended)

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed – host unreachable, SNMP disabled, or wrong credentials. Check HA logs (Logger: custom_components.snmp_switch).
error.priv_requires_auth: Privacy requires an auth protocol and auth passphrase
